overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving along a highway at dusk, passing the illuminated North Oak sign, then taking flight and soaring toward the neon-lit Night City downtown. The camera follows the flying car as it navigates from suburban hills into the dense urban core with towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards.

agents.ego_description: driving the vehicle along the highway toward the North Oak sign, maintaining steady speed on the asphalt road

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights illuminated driving in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large illuminated hillside sign spelling North Oak in white neon letters
dark silhouetted hills forming the backdrop against the twilight sky
tall palm trees lining the left side of the highway
modern curved LED street lamps with warm white light
futuristic skyscrapers with colorful neon lights visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a highway cutting through rolling hills at dusk, with the dark silhouette of mountains against a deep blue sky. The camera follows the vehicle as it approaches the iconic North Oak sign perched on the hillside, while palm trees and modern street lights line the road. In the distance, the neon glow of the city skyline hints at the urban destination ahead.

events.description: vehicle activates thrusters and takes off from the highway surface, transitioning from ground driving to flight

agents.ego_description: activating the vehicle's flight capabilities to lift off the highway and ascend into the air, leaving the road behind

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with illuminated edges ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle launches into the air, transitioning from ground travel to flight. As it ascends, the North Oak sign and palm trees fall behind, while the highway becomes a thin ribbon below. The city skyline shifts from the right to directly ahead, growing larger as the vehicle gains altitude and approaches the highway overpass.

events.description: entering the dense downtown core with massive holographic billboards and towering illuminated skyscrapers dominating the view

agents.ego_description: flying at high speed toward the downtown skyline, navigating above the curved highway while neon-lit buildings fill the field of view

entered.detail: massive glowing advertisements and corporate holograms on building facades
bright full moon visible in the twilight sky above the city towers

segments.scene_description: Now flying high above the highway, the vehicle approaches the glittering downtown core. The city skyline transforms from distant lights to massive neon-clad skyscrapers filling the horizon. Huge holographic billboards illuminate the right side of the frame as the full moon hangs above the towers. The street lights rush by in the foreground while the vehicle maintains its course toward the heart of the metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a suburban highway at dusk into a soaring flight toward a neon-lit metropolis. It begins by tracking a vehicle along a road cutting through rolling hills and palm trees, passing the iconic North Oak sign under a deep blue sky. As the vehicle launches into the air, the highway shrinks into a thin ribbon below and the distant city skyline shifts from the periphery to the center of the frame. The scene then expands as the vehicle gains altitude, transforming the horizon into a dense wall of massive neon-clad skyscrapers and glowing holographic billboards. Finally, the camera glides toward the heart of the metropolis with the full moon hanging above the towering urban core.
